plugins.name: claap
plugins.description: Ready-to-run AI agents for revenue teams, grounded in your real Claap call recordings. Win/loss analysis, battlecards, onboarding decks, customer stories, daily recaps and more — each a skill that pulls transcripts via the Claap MCP and turns meetings into action.
